About.title: About us
About.lead: La Félicità began over 8 years ago with a simple idea: create a place where people feel welcome and rediscover authentic Italian cuisine.
About.body: From day one, we offer generous Italian cuisine, carefully selected products and a warm welcome that are the soul of our house.

pizza.title: Artisan pizzas
pizza.text: Made with traditional biga and matured 72 hours, our light pizzas celebrate the full authenticity of Italy.
pizza.textFull: Prepared with a traditional biga and matured for 72 hours, our pizzas develop a light, flavourful dough that is easy to digest. Topped with carefully selected Italian products, they celebrate the full authenticity of Italian cuisine.
pizza.imageAlt: Pizza baked in a wood-fired oven

pasta.title: Pasta & Italian specialities
pasta.text: From ravioli to linguini, our recipes are crafted with fresh ingredients and particular care for Italian flavours.
pasta.textFull: From ravioli to linguini, our recipes are crafted with fresh ingredients and particular attention to flavour. A generous cuisine inspired by Italian traditions and prepared with passion.

daily.title: Suggestions & daily specials
daily.text: With the seasons and fresh arrivals, our kitchen keeps renewing — let yourself be surprised by our latest creations.
daily.textFull: With the rhythm of the seasons and fresh arrivals, our kitchen renews itself regularly to help you discover new flavours. Let yourself be surprised by the inspirations of the moment and our team's creations.
daily.imageAlt: Daily specials and chef's suggestions at La Félicità

terrace.title: Pleasant terrace
terrace.text: Enjoy our terrace in a warm, friendly atmosphere — perfect for dining al fresco.

takeaway.title: Takeaway
takeaway.text: Order online or by phone and pick up your order quickly.

gallery.title: Discover the restaurant
gallery.text: Browse our gallery and step into the warm atmosphere of La Félicità.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We're here to welcome you, answer your questions and offer you the best experience possible.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.text: Lunch and dinner throughout the week. Check our live opening status.

Contact.thanks: Thank you for your trust — see you soon!
